assignments.name: Set_Required_Field_Values_New_Sites
assignments.label: Set Required Field Values New Sites

assignments.name: Trigger_Automation_for_First_Site_Add

decisions.name: Gov_Same_Billing_Status_at_CW
decisions.label: Gov Same Billing Status at CW?

decisions.description: Check if this opportunity will require child records creation. If so, a message will be displayed to inform them about the time it could take to create those child records
decisions.name: Multi_Site_Opportunity
decisions.label: Multi-Site Opportunity?

decisions.description: Updating the Contact Fields. If Onboarding Path = Standard, then we check if OBS Call was scheduled - that means SSP and Ratecard was added OR if SSP or Rate card was not added then Sales Follow-up Call is scheduled.
decisions.name: Onboarding_Path_Standard
decisions.label: Onboarding Path = Standard

decisions.name: Which_Record_Type_is_the_Opportunity
decisions.label: Which Record Type is the Opportunity

Flow.description: Screen flow used when a reps CW a SaaS opp that enforces all required handoff fields before CW. JH 7/26/23: Adding in new payroll interest fields from sprint 13 ticket 08/23/23 PE - Updated flow to ensure Declined SaaS Training is checked for Site-Add and Self Serve Onboarding values. (Sprint 15 - 2023) 08/30/23 PE - Updated flow to remove logic from the Amount field. (Sprint 16) 10/31/23 OE - Added new field Opportunity Source type to the CW screen (Sprint 20) 11/30/23 JH - Added 2 new opp fields for asana ticket [CS 2023-10-10 17:51:58] 12/15/23 PE - Added a path to create EC opportunity if "Interested in Brightwheel Learning" is true. 12/19/23 JH: removing the creation of contact roles for EC opps since its taken care of in flow: Opportunity - Create Contact Role on Opp Creation 01/26/24 - PE - Removed path that creates Experience Curriculum opportunity and moved it to SaaS CW flow. 03/14/24 - PE - Added a screen to notify reps about a potential delay in creating child records. 6/13/24 - JH - Updated to display BNP Intro Call Field and OBS Owner when BNP paths are selected 06/20/24 - PE - Updated Billing Closed Lost Reason display logic. Added new billing fields. 07/16/24 - PE - Updated logic to require Expected # of Paying Students and Billing Intervals 07/26/24 - MC - Updated logic to require List Price 08/12/24 - PE - Updated OBC and OBS owner logics. Added OBC Call Scheduled Date and Hotpass. 09/06/24 - PE - Updated logic for field # of Total Staff 09/18/2024 - LK - "Other" Promo Field Added to the CW Screen 10/09/24 - PE - Added logic to field # of Total Staff to require value >0 10/10/24 - MC - Added center type to the field inputs 10/13/24 - MC - Added Get Event and Dispositioned Event Check and Error Screen Prior to CW 10/30/24 - PE - Updated HotPass field visibility to be always visible 10/31/24 - BW - Added Sales Meeting = TRUE and CreatedDate within last 90 to Get Event node 11/1/12024 - Added soft warning on the screen if School UUID does not match Account School UUID if it's a returning customer 11/4/2024 - Added Soft warning on the screen for returning customers where the School UUID does not equal the School ID entered. 11/13/2024 - MC - Added Champ fields and section to closed won screen and assignment nodes 12/10/2024 - MC - Added Standard Onboarding Path fields and validations to closed won screen and assignment nodes 12/17/24 - PE - Removed the pre-population for the Number of Schools field from the screen flow. 12/17/24 - MC - added assignment from standard onboarding path fields to contact at CW 12/23/24 - MC - removed OBS call scheduled date, updated the requirements so that Sales follow-up call is always required for standard path 02/10/2025 - updated onboarding paths 02/21/2025 - JH removal of 12 fields + updated behavior for 2 for ticket https://app.asana.com/0/1203697250955484/1209282214889339 04/01/25- PE - updated to incorporate multisite improvements and call subflow for child site record creation 04/01/25- PE - Created logic for input for # of Staff 04/10/25 - PE - Updated mapping for Billing Interval and removed Multi-Site Info field 05/02/25 - PE - Updated the flow to include visibility conditions on screen components based on whether the opportunity is Gov or SaaS. 8/1 - JS - Updated List price formula to account for annual subscriptions

formulas.description: Formula needed because if visibility hides the value on screen, value is stored as null instead of false. Formula stores anything other than true as false to account for null.
formulas.name: DeclinedSaaSTrainingFormula

formulas.description: calculates the list price based off of the current rate card school capacity: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1Q7r3IlbxKbxzB6zs0jGQYZC00d9XsGUho6-ooRV8nK0/edit?gid=747399861#gid=747399861
formulas.name: forC_ListPrice
formulas.expression:
IF( {!Capacity} = 0, 0, IF( {!Capacity} <= 19, 49, IF( {!Capacity} <= 39, 69, IF( {!Capacity} <= 59, 99, IF( {!Capacity} <= 79, 129, IF( {!Capacity} <= 99, 149, IF( {!Capacity} <= 124, 169, IF( {!Capacity} <= 150, 199, IF( {!Capacity} <= 175, 229, IF( {!Capacity} <= 250, 249, 299 ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) *
IF( {!Subscription} = 'Annual', 12 * 0.9, 1 ) )

formulas.description: Formula needed because if visibility hides the value on screen, value is stored as null instead of false. Formula stores anything other than true as false to account for null.
formulas.name: MultiSiteFormula

Flow.label: Opportunity- Screen- Closed/Won Flow

recordUpdates.description: Mapping the OBS Scheduled Date Field to the Contact's Initial Account Setup
recordUpdates.name: Update_Contact_OBS_1_1
recordUpdates.label: Update Contact OBS 1:1

fields.name: RepeaterTitle
fields.fieldText:
COMPLETE CHILD SITE RECORDS


Please verify the existing and complete the outstanding information for the {!forNumberofChildSitesToBeCreated} child sites related to this parent Opportunity. This will create the child Account, Opportunity, and Combined Funnel records.

visibilityRule.conditionLogic: (1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4) OR (5 AND 6 AND (7 OR 8 OR 9 OR 10))

rightValue.stringValue: In Process of Taking Over a School

fields.name: Same_Onboarding_and_SSPR_as_the_Parent
fields.fieldText: Same Onboarding and SSPR as the Parent?

fields.name: Reason_SSP_Was_Not_Added_Details
fields.fieldText: Reason SSP Was Not Added Details

fields.name: Same_Billing_Status_at_CW_as_the_Parent
fields.fieldText: Same Billing Status at CW as the Parent?
fields.helpText: Please confirm if the Billing Status at CW for this specific site matches the values you selected for the parent account. If it’s different, please provide all the additional information.

visibilityRule.conditionLogic: (1 AND 2 AND 3) OR (4 AND 5 AND 6 AND 7)

fields.name: Uses_Attendance_or_Variable_Rate_Billing_Child
fields.fieldText: Uses Attendance or Variable Rate Billing

fields.name: RecordCreationDelayWarning
fields.fieldText: ⚠️ Just a quick heads up: the child Accounts, Opportunities, and Combined Funnels can take up to 3 minutes to be created after you leave this screen. If that doesn’t happen, please go ahead and create a ticket in Zendesk. ⚠️

fields.name: Copy_1_of_RepeaterTitle
fields.fieldText:
COMPLETE CHILD SITE RECORDS


Please verify the existing and complete the outstanding information for the {!forNumberofChildSitesToBeCreated} child sites related to this parent Opportunity. This will create the child Account, Opportunity, and Combined Funnel records.

fields.name: Existing_Account
fields.helpText: If there is an existing account for this child site, select it here

visibilityRule.conditionLogic: (1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4) OR (5 AND 6 AND (7 OR 8 OR 9 OR 10))

rightValue.stringValue: In Process of Taking Over a School

fields.name: Copy_2_of_Same_Onboarding_and_SSPR_as_the_Parent
fields.fieldText: Same Onboarding and SSPR as the Parent?

fields.name: Copy_2_of_Reason_SSP_Was_Not_Added_Details
fields.fieldText: Reason SSP Was Not Added Details

fields.name: Copy_2_of_Same_Billing_Status_at_CW_as_the_Parent
fields.fieldText: Same Billing Status at CW as the Parent?
fields.helpText: Please confirm if the Billing Status at CW for this specific site matches the values you selected for the parent account. If it’s different, please provide all the additional information.

visibilityRule.conditionLogic: (1 AND 2 AND 3) OR (4 AND 5 AND 6 AND 7)

fields.name: Copy_2_of_Uses_Attendance_or_Variable_Rate_Billing_Child
fields.fieldText: Uses Attendance or Variable Rate Billing

fields.name: Copy_2_of_RecordCreationDelayWarning
fields.fieldText: ⚠️ Just a quick heads up: the child Accounts, Opportunities, and Combined Funnels can take up to 3 minutes to be created after you leave this screen. If that doesn’t happen, please go ahead and create a ticket in Zendesk. ⚠️

fields.name: CustomerAccountText
fields.fieldText:
Opportunity Invalid for Closed-Won

An Opportunity cannot be Closed-Won on an Account that is already a Customer. If this is a site add-on - create a new Child Account and update the Account this Opportunity is related to to the new Child Account. Then, you will be able to update it to CW.

fields.name: DispositionEventsText
fields.fieldText: There are Events related to this Opportunity that have not been dispositioned. Disposition them before Closing the Opportunity.

fields.name: Gov_RepeaterTitle
fields.fieldText:
COMPLETE CHILD SITE RECORDS


Based on the Number of Schools provided, you now need to create {!forNumberofChildSitesToBeCreated} child sites.

﻿Please make sure to create that exact number of child sites by clicking the "+ Add" button and filling in all the required fields.

visibilityRule.conditionLogic: (1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4) OR (5 AND 6 AND (7 OR 8 OR 9 OR 10))

rightValue.stringValue: In Process of Taking Over a School

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Same_Onboarding_and_SSPR_as_the_Parent
fields.fieldText: Same Onboarding and SSPR as the Parent?

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Reason_SSP_Was_Not_Added_Details
fields.fieldText: Reason SSP Was Not Added Details

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Same_Billing_Status_at_CW_as_the_Parent
fields.fieldText: Same Billing Status at CW as the Parent?
fields.helpText: Please confirm if the Billing Status at CW for this specific site matches the values you selected for the parent account. If it’s different, please provide all the additional information.

visibilityRule.conditionLogic: (1 AND 2 AND 3) OR (4 AND 5 AND 6 AND 7)

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Uses_Attendance_or_Variable_Rate_Billing_Child
fields.fieldText: Uses Attendance or Variable Rate Billing

fields.name: Copy_1_of_RecordCreationDelayWarning
fields.fieldText: ⚠️ Just a quick heads up: the child Accounts, Opportunities, and Combined Funnels can take up to 3 minutes to be created after you leave this screen. If that doesn’t happen, please go ahead and create a ticket in Zendesk. ⚠️

fields.name: NotOwnerErrorText
fields.fieldText: You are not able to Close-Win this Opportunity because you are not the Opportunity Owner.

fields.name: WarningSchoolUUID
fields.fieldText: Warning: Returning programs should use their old school UUID. Please avoid creating a new school UUID when possible. If the customer would like to start from scratch, please chatter the Onboarding Specialist to have them help the customer refresh their account

validationRule.errorMessage: Number of Schools has to be greater than 0. If Number of Schools is greater than 1, Onboarding Path must be '1:1 Multi-Site'
If the Current Enrollment is 15 or more, please enter a number greater than 0. If it's less than 15, 0 is acceptable.
validationRule.formulaExpression: AND( {!OnboardingPath} <> "Site-Add", {!OnboardingPath} <> "BNP Site-Add", {!OnboardingPath} <> "Brand New Program", OR( AND( {!of_Total_Staff} = 0, {!Current_Enrollment} < 15 ), {!of_Total_Staff} > 0 ) )

validationRule.errorMessage: Value must be greater than 0
"Other" Promo Offer Text has to be 40 characters or less.

fields.name: If_SaaS_Payer_Is_Offline_Exit
fields.fieldText: ﻿Please exit this flow and ensure the Partnership agreement has been added to the files section before closing this Opportunity.

fields.name: Opportunity_Source_Type
fields.helpText:
Inbound Self-Sourced: This is a new organization that comes from a warm lead from Marketing and is directed to an FCR.

Outbound Self-Sourced: This is a new organization that comes from a cold lead already in our database, assigned to an FCR by DataOps.

Site Add: This is when an existing organization adds brightwheel to a new school. The lead could come from Intercom, web traffic, or direct contact with the FCR via email or phone

fields.name: Standard_Warning
fields.fieldText:
If the Onboarding Path is 'Standard,' please enter if SSP was added.


If SSP was added = Yes, Billing at CW = opted in, and Was Rate Card Captured = Yes, the OBS Owner and OBS Scheduled Date are required. 


If Was SSP Added on Call = No OR Billing at CW = Opted In, and Was Rate Card Captured = No, the Sales Follow-up Call Scheduled Date is required.


 If Was SSP added on call = No, please select a reason in Reason SSP was not added. 


Note: The 'Rate Card Captured' field is in the Billing section if Billing = 'Opted In.

fields.name: Site_Add_Warning
fields.fieldText: If the Onboarding Path is set to 'Site-Add', please ensure that a parent account has been added to this opportunity's account.

fields.name: WebinarText
fields.fieldText: Webinar is not a valid selection, please choose a different onboarding path.

visibilityRule.conditionLogic: (1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4) OR (5 AND 6 AND (7 OR 8 OR 9 OR 10))

rightValue.stringValue: In Process of Taking Over a School

fields.name: Declined_SaaS_Training
fields.helpText: If the Onboarding Path is set to 'Self Serve', the 'Declined SaaS Training' checkbox must be checked. If it's set to 'Site-Add', the 'Declined SaaS Training' checkbox must be checked and this opportunity's account must have a parent account.

validationRule.errorMessage: If the Onboarding Path is set to 'Self Serve', the 'Declined SaaS Training' checkbox must be checked. If it's set to 'Site-Add', the 'Declined SaaS Training' checkbox must be checked and this opportunity's account must have a parent account.

fields.name: Reason_SSP_was_not_added_detail
fields.fieldText: Reason SSP was not added detail

visibilityRule.conditionLogic: 1 OR 2 OR 3 OR 4 OR ( 5 AND 6 AND ( 7 OR 8))

fields.name: BillingOptOutReasonDetail
fields.fieldText: If Billing Status at CW = Hard Opt Out or Soft Opt Out, Billing Opt Out Reason Detail is required.

fields.name: CurrentToolForBillingMessage
fields.fieldText: If Billing Status at CW = Opted In or Soft Opt Out, Current Tool for Billing is required

fields.name: Uses_Attendance_or_Variable_Rate_Billing
fields.fieldText: Uses Attendance or Variable Rate Billing

fields.name: BillingIntervalsMessage
fields.fieldText: If Billing Status at CW = Opted In or Soft Opt Out, Billing Intervals is required

fields.name: Required_Billing_Fields_Warning
fields.fieldText: If Billing Status at CW = Opted In or Soft Opt Out, Expected # Of Paying Students is required. If Billing Status at CW = Opted In, Target Billing Launch Timeframe is required.
